The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 2. Let me parse the results:
## Summary

**Failures Found**: 1 issue with Prettier formatting
### Detailed Results

These files need to be reformatted with Prettier. Run `prettier --write` to fix these files.

The Prettier formatting violation is the only issue preventing the CI from passing. The offending files are: 1. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` 2. `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
